title: Episode III Set Diary
content:
{{Top|rwm}}
[[File:Ep3SD.png|thumb|215px]]
'''Episode III Set Diary''' was a feature on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] fan club website. Only accessible by paid Hyperspace members, the feature contained 127 on-location diary entries written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] during the production of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] from [[May 24]], [[2003]] to [[February 2]], [[2005]]. Several would also be released by Hidalgo after the release of the film.

With the [[2011]] revamp of [[StarWars.com]], Hyperspace ceased to exist and all of its member-only content with it. However, a select amount of the Set Diaries would later be re-published for free on StarWars.com on [[May 20]], [[2025]], commemorating the 20th anniversary of the release of ''Revenge of the Sith''.<ref name="20th">{{SW|url=news/revenge-of-the-sith-20th-hyperspace-set-diaries|text=''Revenge of the Sith'' at 20: Return of Pablo Hidalgo's Episode III Set Diaries}}</ref>
